transcript: Uh, yes. D’you have some questions about life insurance?
You’re goin’ too fast! Who’s a—who’s that?
Uh, my name’s Karen and, ah, I sell life insurance. Is that something that you’re interested in?
Well, I have never sold you anything but I can. If you have questions—
—Who are you—w—ha—what company are you with?
And why are you choosin’ me?
Uh, no, um, Ralford called me and was questioning me about life insurance.
Who called you? He knows me?
I think he said you were his father!
Are you talkin’ about Jim Sauer?
No, he said he name was Ralford Lightfoot.
That’s not my son. You got the wrong number. And if you don’t know my son, I don’t know who I’m talkin’ to. Because a lotta criminals are calling me nowadays. A lotta criminals—
Y’all called me. I didn’t call you. Y’all called me.
I didn’t call you! I never did.
No, I—no, he did. He called me a minute ago.
Well, the first time he called me—
—You called me! Y—you got my phone number and I never called you.
No, Ralford called me. Uh, the first time, he said his name was Ralford Lightfoot. The second time he called me, he said his name was Jarvis.
Well I don’t know any of those names. You say that I called you? You—you—you’re the one that wants to insure me?
I don’t know who the hell it is! And let him go to hell! I don’t know him! Stop calling me! Because I’mma call the police and I’m gonna have you arrested for harassing me!
